text: We have a moral obligation to protect the most vulnerable members of our society. Cutting healthcare for children is simply cruel.
The new infrastructure bill passed the Senate today with bipartisan support. It allocates $50B to transportation.
It's disgusting that corporations can pollute our water and get away with it while ordinary families suffer the consequences.
True patriots stand by their country no matter what. Those who protest the flag are betraying everything we stand for.
Everyone deserves equal pay for equal work regardless of gender. The wage gap is an injustice we must address now.
The government has no right to tell people what they can or cannot do in their own homes. Freedom means freedom for all.
Respect for our elders and institutions is what holds society together. Young people today have lost that sense of duty.
Meeting at city hall is at 7pm tonight to discuss the proposed zoning changes on Oak Street. Parking available behind the building.
These immigrants are corrupting our culture and bringing in practices that go against everything decent. We need to preserve our way of life.
Children are suffering at the border while politicians argue about budgets. We cannot look away from their pain and still call ourselves compassionate.
